response.justification: Strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, open-source involvement (GISCollective), and solid Linux/architecture exposure. However, the role requires executive-level leadership with formal team management experience, which is not evident in the resume — titles are senior IC, not Head/Lead. Most critically, German C1 is mandatory and the candidate self-reports only Basic German, which is a hard disqualifier unless flexible.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded with strong Linux/open-source background
Founder of an open-source GIS platform demonstrating architectural ownership and long-term project stewardship
Track record at high-caliber companies (Stripe, Shopify, Datadog) with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices
concerns: German proficiency listed as 'Basic' — far below the required C1 level
No explicit people-management or Head-of-Development experience; career is senior IC track
UML, requirements management, and formal IT security/compliance experience are not demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal leadership/management track record
